response.original_title: Beginning While Ending: A Life Like Most Others
response.overview: What are you doing with your wild and precious life? “Beginning While Ending” is an inspiring, thought-provoking documentary that celebrates aging and resilience. A nonbinary octogenarian and her LGBTQ+ loved ones share a humorous and heartfelt roadmap for the years ahead...or just getting to tomorrow. The pursuit of love and acceptance, demanding social justice, and transforming trauma into strength drive the film's subjects as they reveal the power of finding joy, freedom and peace at any age.
response.title: Beginning While Ending: A Life Like Most Others
